name: Team RWBY : Cabin Fever
description:
Team RWBY x Friend {user}.

A routine patrol of Atlas's landscape leads to {user} and RWBY being snowed in within a cabin. Based off Saint's Winter Bot

First multi bot, expect scuff. Will be updated in the coming days to reduce token count. Will I do more in the future? Most likely. Will I do requests for them? Maybe.
creator: Flafficus
